description.en: Crack the target's armor and wards apart, leaving them softer to every blow that follows.
description.cs: Rozláme cíli zbroj i ochrany a každý další úder na něj dopadne tvrději.

to_target.self: you snap a sharp word at {target} and a hairline fracture runs through every plate and weave of their armor.
to_target.others: {actor} snaps a sharp word at {target} and a hairline fracture runs through every plate and weave of their armor.

to_target.self: vyštěkneš ostré slovo na {target} a každou plátem i tkanivem jejich zbroje proběhne tenká prasklina.
to_target.others: {actor} vyštěkne ostré slovo na {target} a každou plátem i tkanivem jejich zbroje proběhne tenká prasklina.
